description: Use this API to run critical clearing time calculation in dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5.0. ierr, crct_val = crctrun(initial_fd, total_sim_t, stp_srch_flg, stp_srch_fd, genang_thr, ibusex, id, fd_unit)
python_syntax: ierr, crct_val = crctrun(initial_fd, total_sim_t, stp_srch_flg, stp_srch_fd, genang_thr, ibusex, id, fd_unit)

parameters.name: initial_fd
parameters.description: Initial fault duration while starting critical clearing time calculation (unit depends on ‘fd_unit’ argument). (input; 5.0 by default).

parameters.name: stp_srch_flg
parameters.description: Flag for stop searching critical clearing time calculation (if network remain stable after stp_srch_fd duration). (input; TRUE by default).

parameters.name: stp_srch_fd
parameters.description: Stop searching critical clearing time calculation, if network remain stable after stp_srch_fd duration (unit depends on ‘fd_unit’ argument). (input; 30.0 by default).

parameters.name: genang_thr
parameters.description: Value of the deviation threshold for conventional generators to determine stability (degree). (input; 180.0 by default).

parameters.name: ibusex
parameters.description: Relative angle calculation to be applied. (input; if batch command; unchanged by default)).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Machine identifier. (input; if batch command; ‘1’ by default)).

parameters.name: fd_unit
parameters.description: Unit for ‘initial_fd’, ‘stp_srch_fd’, and ‘crct_val’ arguments. (input; 1 by default).

ibusex.description: use machine ID at bus IBUSEX as the reference machine.

crct_val.description: Critical Clearing Time output value (unit depends on ‘FD_UNIT’ argument).
CrCT search stopped because CrCT is longer than (Total Simulation Time - Contingency Starting Time).
CrCT search stopped because of ‘STP_SRCH_FLG’ being Active.
CrCT can not be found, there is no stable fault duration.

error_codes.description: bus not found (for relative angle calculation).
bus is not a type 2 bus (for relative angle calculation).
machine does not have a synchronous machine model (for relative angle calculation).
machine not found (for relative angle calculation).
machine is out of service (for relative angle calculation).
an internal error occured, please check messages.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
